prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `09c534e7`.
codex_response:
Rule summary: each 4-connected nonzero blob keeps its outer `1`-cell shell, and every cell whose full 8-neighborhood stays inside that blob is recolored to the blob’s seed color. The verifier in [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_09c534e7/verifier.py#L4) implements that directly with shifted-set intersections, and the package wiring is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_09c534e7/__init__.py#L1).

I used the `opus46` hint as the starting hypothesis and discarded the `sonnet45` hint; the mismatch and corrected rule are recorded in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_09c534e7/notes.md#L1). The generator in [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_09c534e7/generator.py#L43) builds explicit orthogonal room-and-corridor blobs, then filters on component density, interior ratio, and whole-grid occupancy so the previews stay in the same visual family as the official task. No new primitive was needed.

Validation passed: `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 09c534e7` matched all 4 official examples, and `python -m arc2.shared.build --task 09c534e7 --n-examples 1000` produced 1000 verified examples plus previews. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/09c534e7/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/09c534e7/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/09c534e7/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/09c534e7/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/09c534e7/previews/preview_03.png).
